title: Mini Electric Screwdriver, 68 in 1 Precision Screwdriver Set with 64 Magnetic Bits, 5 Torque Settings, 4 LED Lights, Rechargeable Repair Tool Kit for Electronics, Phone, Camera, Laptop, Watch
features: Wide Application: This mini screwdriver set equipped with 64 S2 precision bits in 12 categories and 2 lengths, suitable for most electronics repair. NOTE: This repair tool kit is intended for LIGHTER TASKS that require little torque. Heavier use, such as driving long screws into wood is a job for a drill, not a screwdriver

5 Gear Torque: Accwork 68 in 1 precision screwdriver set features with 5 eletric torque settings ranging from 0.25 N.m to 0.35 N.m, and a manual torque of 3.5 N.m, which offers precise torque forces for a variety of precision work including PC, computer, laptop, phone and other electronic devices

Long-lasting Battery: Powered by 350mAh rechargeable lithium battery, Accwork electric screwdriver set can be fully charged in just 60 minutes and can handle up to 1000 screws on a full charge. USB-C charging port makes the charging more convenient. NOTE: USB-C PD charger is not supported

Pop-up Design: This electronic repair tool kit adopts pop-up design, which is very convenient to open or close the case. The charging port is accessible without taking the screwdriver out of the case. The case, bit holder and bits are all magnetic for easy attachment. Extra magnetisation zone allows to magnetise the drill at any time

User-friendly Design: The cordless precision screwdriver is ergonomically designed in a pen shape, which is lightweight, anti-slip and easy to grip. The built-in LED lights enhances visibility, making it great for building PCs and assembling small tech devices. The Digital screen makes it easy to adjust torque and check battery level
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 5 Gear Electric Torque 2 Long-lasting Battery 3 Built-in LED Lights Pop-up Design This precision screwdriver set features a pop-up design for easy opening, making it perfect for quick access during repairs. Built-in Magnetizer With a built-in magnetizer, this electronic screwdriver set can easily add or remove magnetism from screwdriver bits, enhancing precision. Comfortable Pen Size Designed with a comfortable pen grip, this mini screwdriver ensures ease of use, ideal for extended DIY sessions. 200r/min Speed Operates at a steady 200r/min, this electric screwdriver set is ideal for delicate tasks on electronics.
